messages.content:
I want to design this part: ForgeCAD project: /Users/ysingh/PycharmProjects/Capstone-v0.1/forgecad-workspace

Office chair assembly in millimeters. Base is a 5-spoke star pattern radiating from a central 50mm cylinder, overall base footprint diameter 600mm. Central support column is a cylinder 400mm tall, 50mm diameter. Seat pan is a rounded square plate 450mm x 450mm, thickness 30mm, featuring a 5mm ergonomic contour dip in the center. Backrest is a rectangular plate 400mm wide, 500mm high, 20mm thick, curved backward at a 15-degree angle, connected to the rear bottom of the seat pan by a 50mm wide x 10mm thick vertical steel bracket.

Okay, I understand the overall design. To make sure I've got everything right for the base, what's the diameter of each of the five spokes?
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "base_cylinder_diameter_mm": 50,
    "base_diameter_mm": 600,
    "support_column_height_mm": 400,
    "support_column_diameter_mm": 50,
    "seat_pan_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_length_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_thickness_mm": 30,
    "seat_pan_contour_dip_mm": 5,
    "backrest_width_mm": 400,
    "backrest_height_mm": 500,
    "backrest_thickness_mm": 20,
    "backrest_angle_deg": 15,
    "bracket_width_mm": 50,
    "bracket_thickness_mm": 10
  },
  "pending_questions": [
    "What is the diameter of each of the five spokes?"
  ],
  "is_ready": false
}
```

Okay, I'll set the spoke diameter to 40mm. Now, what is the length of each spoke, measured from the center cylinder to the tip?
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "base_cylinder_diameter_mm": 50,
    "base_diameter_mm": 600,
    "support_column_height_mm": 400,
    "support_column_diameter_mm": 50,
    "seat_pan_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_length_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_thickness_mm": 30,
    "seat_pan_contour_dip_mm": 5,
    "backrest_width_mm": 400,
    "backrest_height_mm": 500,
    "backrest_thickness_mm": 20,
    "backrest_angle_deg": 15,
    "bracket_width_mm": 50,
    "bracket_thickness_mm": 10,
    "spoke_diameter_mm": 40
  },
  "pending_questions": [
    "What is the length of each spoke, measured from the center cylinder to the tip?"
  ],
  "is_ready": false
}
```

Okay, I'll set the spoke length to 275mm (making the overall diameter 600mm). Finally, how tall is the vertical steel bracket connecting the seat pan and backrest?
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "base_cylinder_diameter_mm": 50,
    "base_diameter_mm": 600,
    "support_column_height_mm": 400,
    "support_column_diameter_mm": 50,
    "seat_pan_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_length_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_thickness_mm": 30,
    "seat_pan_contour_dip_mm": 5,
    "backrest_width_mm": 400,
    "backrest_height_mm": 500,
    "backrest_thickness_mm": 20,
    "backrest_angle_deg": 15,
    "bracket_width_mm": 50,
    "bracket_thickness_mm": 10,
    "spoke_diameter_mm": 40,
    "spoke_length_mm": 275
  },
  "pending_questions": [
    "How tall is the vertical steel bracket connecting the seat pan and backrest?"
  ],
  "is_ready": false
}
```

Okay, I'll set the bracket height to 150mm.

I have all the measurements I need — ready to generate.
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "base_cylinder_diameter_mm": 50,
    "base_diameter_mm": 600,
    "support_column_height_mm": 400,
    "support_column_diameter_mm": 50,
    "seat_pan_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_length_mm": 450,
    "seat_pan_thickness_mm": 30,
    "seat_pan_contour_dip_mm": 5,
    "backrest_width_mm": 400,
    "backrest_height_mm": 500,
    "backrest_thickness_mm": 20,
    "backrest_angle_deg": 15,
    "bracket_width_mm": 50,
    "bracket_thickness_mm": 10,
    "spoke_diameter_mm": 40,
    "spoke_length_mm": 275,
    "bracket_height_mm": 150
  },
  "pending_questions": [],
  "is_ready": true
}
```
